---
title: "nicole_hierarchial"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

### Final pipeline

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rstanarm)

cleaned_data <- read_csv("data/cleaned_data.csv")
glimpse(data)
```

```{r}
cleaned_data <- cleaned_data %>%
  mutate(
    Missed = Attempts - Completions
  ) %>%
  select(Player, year, Completions, Missed, Attempts, year)
```

```{r}
historical <- cleaned_data %>%
  filter(year < 2025)

data_2025 <- cleaned_data %>%
  filter(year == 2025)
```

```{r}
hist_model <- stan_glmer(
  cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | Player) + (1 | year),
  data = historical,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 5000*2,
  seed = 123,
  refresh = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
posterior <- as.data.frame(hist_model)
mu_median <- median(posterior$`(Intercept)`)
mu_sd   <- sd(posterior$`(Intercept)`)
```

```{r}
model_2025 <- stan_glmer(
  cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | Player),
  data = data_2025,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  prior_intercept = normal(location = mu_median, scale =  mu_sd),
  prior_aux = exponential(1),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 5000*2,
  seed = 123, 
  refresh = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
library(bayesplot)

posterior_array <- as.array(model_2025)
```

```{r}
mcmc_trace(posterior_array, 
           pars = c("(Intercept)", "Sigma[Player:(Intercept),(Intercept)]"))
```

```{r}
mcmc_acf(posterior_array, 
         pars = c("(Intercept)", "Sigma[Player:(Intercept),(Intercept)]"))
```

```{r}
mcmc_dens_overlay(posterior_array, 
           pars = c("(Intercept)", "Sigma[Player:(Intercept),(Intercept)]"))
```

```{r}
library(bayesplot)
pp_check(model_2025, nreps = 100)
```

```{r}
post_preds <- posterior_epred(model_2025)

mu_preds <- colMeans(post_preds)

actual_rates <- data_2025$Completions / (data_2025$Completions + data_2025$Missed)

mae_2025 <- mean(abs(mu_preds - actual_rates))
mae_2025
```

```{r}
y_actual <- data_2025$Completions
y_rep <- posterior_predict(model_2025)

ppc_dens_overlay(y_actual, y_rep[1:100, ]) +
  labs(title = "Posterior Predictive Check",
       subtitle = "Actual completions vs. 100 simulated versions")
```

### Checking if random intercepts are needed

```{r}
# Full Model (What you have now)
fit_both <- stan_glmer(cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | Player) + (1 | year), 
                       data = historical, family = binomial, refresh = FALSE)

# Model without Year
fit_player_only <- stan_glmer(cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | Player), 
                              data = historical, family = binomial, refresh = FALSE)

# Model without Player (just to be thorough)
fit_year_only <- stan_glmer(cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ 1 + (1 | year), 
                            data = historical, family = binomial, refresh = FALSE)

```

```{r}
# 1. Run kfold for both models
kfold_full <- kfold(fit_both, K = 10)
kfold_player_only <- kfold(fit_player_only, K = 10)

# 2. Compare
loo_compare(kfold_full, kfold_player_only)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(broom.mixed)

year_intercepts <- tidy(fit_both, effects = "ran_vals") %>% 
  filter(group == "year")

ggplot(year_intercepts, aes(x = level, y = estimate)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = estimate - std.error, ymax = estimate + std.error), width = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Relative Difficulty by Year (Log-Odds)",
       x = "Year", y = "Adjustment to Completion Rate") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
kfold_year_only <- kfold(fit_year_only, K = 10)
loo_compare(kfold_full, kfold_year_only)
```

```{r}
ggplot(player_intercepts, aes(x = reorder(level, estimate), y = estimate)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = estimate - std.error, ymax = estimate + std.error), width = 0.2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Relative Difficulty by Player (Log-Odds)",
       x = "Player", 
       y = "Adjustment to Completion Rate") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)) # Rotates names 45 degrees
```

```{r}
historical$year_idx <- historical$year - min(historical$year)

fit_intercept <- stan_glmer(
  cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ year_idx + (1 | Player) + (1 | year),
  data = historical,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  cores = 2, seed = 123, refresh = FALSE
)

fit_slope <- stan_glmer(
  cbind(Completions, Missed) ~ year_idx + (1 + year_idx | Player) + (1 | year),
  data = historical,
  family = binomial(link = "logit"),
  cores = 2, seed = 123, refresh = FALSE
)

k_intercept <- kfold(fit_intercept, K = 10)
k_slope     <- kfold(fit_slope, K = 10)

comparison <- loo_compare(k_intercept, k_slope)
print(comparison)
```

```{r}
library(broom.mixed)
# Extract the slope estimates for each player
player_slopes <- tidy(fit_slope, effects = "ran_vals") %>% 
  filter(term == "year_idx")

ggplot(player_slopes, aes(x = reorder(level, estimate), y = estimate)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Who is Improving vs. Declining?",
       subtitle = "Positive = Improving completion rate over time",
       x = "Player", y = "Slope (Rate of Change)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
print(fit_slope, pars = "sigma")
```
